metadata.notes: v3.0.0 — Added 79 new countries (Argentina through Vietnam). Total 87 countries.

authorities.name: Ministry of Labour & Employment, Government of India
authorities.notes: Primary central authority for all labour law, enforcement, and social security policy

authorities.name: Income Tax Department – Ministry of Finance
authorities.notes: Central direct tax authority; CBDT issues policy circulars

authorities.name: Bureau of Immigration – Ministry of Home Affairs
authorities.notes: Foreigners registration, employment and business visas, OCI cards

authorities.name: Ministry of Law and Justice – Legislative Department
authorities.notes: Authoritative source for all central Acts, Bills, Ordinances, and Constitution

authorities.name: Directorate General Factory Advice Service & Labour Institutes (DGFASLI)
authorities.notes: OSH regulator for factories, docks; enforces OSH Code 2020 for organised sector

authorities.name: Employees' Provident Fund Organisation (EPFO)
authorities.notes: Manages PF, EPS pension, EDLI insurance for organised sector

authorities.name: Fair Work Ombudsman
authorities.notes: Primary enforcer of employment conditions, minimum wages, and NES compliance

authorities.name: Fair Work Commission
authorities.notes: Tribunal for enterprise agreements, award variations, unfair dismissal

authorities.name: Australian Taxation Office (ATO)
authorities.notes: Income tax, PAYG, superannuation, GST, FBT

authorities.name: Department of Home Affairs
authorities.notes: Work visas, skilled migration, employer sponsorship obligations

authorities.name: Federal Register of Legislation
authorities.notes: Authoritative source for all Commonwealth Acts and instruments

authorities.name: Safe Work Australia
authorities.notes: National OSH policy body; enforcement is by state/territory regulators

authorities.name: Ministry of Manpower (MOM)
authorities.notes: Employment Act, work passes, workplace safety (OSHD), foreign worker levy

authorities.name: Inland Revenue Authority of Singapore (IRAS)
authorities.notes: Income tax, GST (9%), property tax, withholding tax, stamp duty

authorities.name: CPF Board – Central Provident Fund
authorities.notes: Mandatory savings for SG citizens and PRs; covers retirement, Medisave, HDB

authorities.name: Immigration & Checkpoints Authority (ICA)
authorities.notes: PR and citizenship applications; long-term passes

authorities.name: Singapore Statutes Online – Attorney-General's Chambers
authorities.notes: Authoritative repository of all Singapore Acts and subsidiary legislation

authorities.name: Workplace Safety and Health Council (WSHC)
authorities.notes: Industry-specific WSH guidelines, bizSAFE framework; policy arm under MOM-OSHD

authorities.name: Department of Employment and Labour
authorities.notes: LRA, BCEA, employment equity, UIF, COIDA, skills development, OSH inspection

authorities.name: South African Revenue Service (SARS)
authorities.notes: Income tax, PAYE, VAT (15%), corporate tax, customs

authorities.name: Department of Home Affairs
authorities.notes: Work visas (critical skills, general, intra-company), PR, business visas; high URL instability

authorities.name: South African Government – Official Gazette
authorities.notes: Proclamations, notices, regulations, all new legislation

authorities.name: Commission for Conciliation, Mediation and Arbitration (CCMA)
authorities.notes: Dispute resolution for unfair dismissal and unfair labour practices; free to employees

authorities.name: Unemployment Insurance Fund (UIF)
authorities.notes: 2% UIF contributions; claims for unemployment, illness, maternity

authorities.name: Ministry of Human Resources & Emiratisation (MOHRE)
authorities.notes: Federal Labour Law No. 33/2021; WPS; Emiratisation; dispute resolution; OSH for mainland

authorities.name: Federal Tax Authority (FTA)
authorities.notes: Corporate Tax (9% since June 2023), VAT (5%), Excise Tax

authorities.name: Federal Authority for Identity, Citizenship, Customs & Port Security (ICP)
authorities.notes: Residence visas, Emirates ID, Golden and Green Visa

authorities.name: UAE Federal Legislation – Ministry of Justice
authorities.notes: Official repository of UAE federal laws and decrees

authorities.name: General Pension & Social Security Authority (GPSSA)
authorities.notes: Social security for UAE nationals only; 12.5% employer + 5% employee

authorities.name: Dubai International Financial Centre (DIFC)
authorities.notes: Separate jurisdiction from federal UAE law; own Employment Law (DIFC Law No. 2/2019) and OSH regime

authorities.name: Employment New Zealand – MBIE
authorities.notes: Employment Relations Act 2000; minimum wage; leave; collective bargaining; personal grievances

authorities.name: WorkSafe New Zealand
authorities.notes: Primary regulator under HSWA 2015; incident notification, enforcement, codes of practice

authorities.name: Inland Revenue – Te Tari Taake
authorities.notes: PAYE, GST (15%), KiwiSaver, Working for Families, student loan

authorities.name: Immigration New Zealand (INZ) – MBIE
authorities.notes: Work visas (AEWV), residence visas, employer accreditation

authorities.name: New Zealand Parliamentary Counsel Office
authorities.notes: Authoritative source for all NZ Acts, regulations, and legislative instruments

authorities.name: Accident Compensation Corporation (ACC)
authorities.notes: No-fault accident compensation; levies paid by employers and workers

authorities.name: Department of Labor and Employment (DOLE)
authorities.notes: Labor Code, OSH (RA 11058), AEP, DOLE registration, minimum wage oversight

authorities.name: Bureau of Internal Revenue (BIR)
authorities.notes: Income tax, withholding tax, VAT (12%), BIR registration

authorities.name: Social Security System (SSS)
authorities.notes: Mandatory social insurance for private sector; sickness, maternity, disability, retirement

authorities.name: Philippine Health Insurance Corporation (PhilHealth)
authorities.notes: Mandatory health insurance; 5% of monthly salary, shared equally

authorities.name: Bureau of Immigration (BI)
authorities.notes: Employment visas (9g), ACR I-Card; high URL instability — verify quarterly

authorities.name: Official Gazette of the Philippines
authorities.notes: Executive Orders, Presidential Decrees, Republic Acts, proclamations

authorities.name: DOLE – Bureau of Working Conditions (BWC)
authorities.notes: OSH standards, OSHS, RA 11058 implementing rules, WAIR accident reporting

authorities.name: Ministry of Overseas Pakistanis & Human Resource Development
authorities.notes: Federal authority for labour policy, human resource development, and overseas workers. Note: Labour is a provincial subject under 18th Amendment — provincial labour departments (Punjab, Sindh, KPK, Balochistan) are primary enforcers.

authorities.name: Punjab Labour & Human Resource Department
authorities.notes: Primary labour enforcer for Punjab (largest province). Covers Punjab Minimum Wages, industrial relations, factory inspections.

authorities.name: Federal Board of Revenue (FBR)
authorities.notes: Federal authority for income tax, sales tax, withholding tax, customs. Issues Statutory Regulatory Orders (SROs) and tax circulars.

authorities.name: Employees' Old-Age Benefits Institution (EOBI)
authorities.notes: Mandatory pension/old-age benefit for private sector employees. Employer contributes 5%, employee 1% of minimum wage.

authorities.name: Provincial Employees Social Security Institution (PESSI / SESSI / KPESSI)
authorities.notes: Provincial social security (medical/sickness) — separate bodies per province: PESSI (Punjab), SESSI (Sindh), KPESSI (KPK). Balochistan equivalent has limited online presence.

authorities.name: Directorate General of Immigration & Passports
authorities.notes: Issues work visas, business visas, and manages foreigners registration. Work permits for foreign nationals also require BOI approval for certain categories.

authorities.name: Board of Investment (BOI) Pakistan
authorities.notes: Issues No Objection Certificates (NOCs) for foreign workers; oversees work permit approvals for expatriates in corporate roles.

authorities.name: National Assembly of Pakistan – Legislation
authorities.notes: Primary source for passed Acts. Punjab Assembly (punjabassembly.gov.pk) and Sindh Assembly (sindhassembly.gov.pk) for provincial legislation.

authorities.name: Pakistan Gazette – Ministry of Law and Justice
authorities.notes: Official gazette notifications for federal laws and SROs. Note: Digital archive is inconsistent; many older gazettes only available in print or via National Library.

authorities.name: Provincial Factory Inspectorates (under Labour Departments)
authorities.notes: OSH is governed by the Factories Act 1934 and provincial rules. No dedicated federal OSH agency exists — enforcement is via provincial Factory Inspectorates under each Labour Department. Dedicated OSH portal: not available at federal level.

authorities.name: Secretaría de Trabajo, Empleo y Seguridad Social
authorities.notes: Main labour authority under Ministry of Human Capital. Covers employment law, minimum wage, termination, leave.

authorities.name: Agencia de Recaudación y Control Aduanero (ARCA)
authorities.notes: Replaced AFIP in Oct 2024. Collects income tax and social security contributions (Form 931). Use arca.gob.ar if redirected.

authorities.name: Administración Nacional de la Seguridad Social (ANSES)
authorities.notes: Administers pensions, family allowances, maternity pay, unemployment insurance for private-sector employees.

authorities.name: Dirección Nacional de Migraciones
authorities.notes: Work permits and residency authorizations for foreign workers.

authorities.name: InfoLEG – Centro de Documentación e Información
authorities.notes: Official legislation database – search all Argentine national laws and decrees.

authorities.name: Bundesministerium für Soziales, Gesundheit, Pflege und Konsumentenschutz (Sozialministerium)
authorities.notes: Federal Ministry of Social Affairs. Covers labour law, social security policy, OSH. AMS (employment service) operates under its supervision.

authorities.name: Bundesministerium für Finanzen (BMF)
authorities.notes: Federal Ministry of Finance. Oversees income tax, wage tax (Lohnsteuer), and VAT in Austria.

authorities.name: Österreichische Gesundheitskasse (ÖGK)
authorities.notes: Austrian Health Insurance Fund – main social insurance body for employees covering health, accident, and pension.

authorities.name: Bundesministerium für Inneres (BM.I)
authorities.notes: Federal Ministry of Interior. Issues work permits and residence permits for non-EU nationals.

authorities.name: Rechtsinformationssystem des Bundes (RIS)
authorities.notes: Official federal law database – all Austrian acts, ordinances and court decisions.

authorities.name: Ministry of Labour and Social Protection of Population
authorities.notes: Primary authority for labour law, employment, social protection and OSH in Azerbaijan.

authorities.name: State Tax Service under the Ministry of Economy
authorities.notes: Administers income tax, VAT, and mandatory social insurance contributions.

authorities.name: State Social Protection Fund (DSMF)
authorities.notes: Collects and manages social insurance contributions and pensions.

authorities.name: State Migration Service
authorities.notes: Issues work permits and residence permits for foreign nationals.

authorities.name: e-Qanun (Official Legislation Portal)
authorities.notes: Official legal acts database of Azerbaijan. Contains Labour Code and all legislation.

authorities.name: Ministry of Labour and Social Development
authorities.notes: Primary authority for labour law, employment, and work permits in Bahrain.

authorities.name: National Bureau for Revenue (NBR)
authorities.notes: Administers VAT (introduced 2019) and other indirect taxes. Bahrain has no personal income tax.

authorities.name: Social Insurance Organization (SIO)
authorities.notes: Administers mandatory social insurance contributions for employees in Bahrain.

authorities.name: General Directorate of Nationality, Passports & Residence
authorities.notes: Handles residence permits and immigration for foreign nationals.

authorities.name: Bahrain Legal Network (Legislation Portal)
authorities.notes: Official legal affairs portal for Bahrain legislation.

authorities.name: Ministry of Labour and Employment
authorities.notes: Primary authority covering the Bangladesh Labour Act 2006 and employment rules.

authorities.name: National Board of Revenue (NBR)
authorities.notes: Administers income tax, VAT, and customs in Bangladesh.

authorities.name: Department of Labour (DoL)
authorities.notes: Implements labour welfare fund and social protection under Ministry of Labour.

authorities.name: Department of Immigration and Passports
authorities.notes: Issues work visas and foreign nationals' registration in Bangladesh.

authorities.name: Bangladesh National Parliament (Legislative Database)
authorities.notes: Official legal database containing all Bangladesh acts including the Labour Act 2006.

authorities.name: Federal Public Service Employment, Labour and Social Dialogue (FPS ELSD)
authorities.notes: Primary federal authority for employment law, working conditions, and social dialogue.

authorities.name: Federal Public Service Finance (FPS Finance)
authorities.notes: Administers income tax (IPP/PB), corporate tax, and VAT in Belgium.

authorities.name: National Social Security Office (NSSO/ONSS)
authorities.notes: Collects social security contributions from employers in Belgium.

authorities.name: Immigration Office (DVZ/OE)
authorities.notes: Federal Immigration Office handling work permits and residence for foreign nationals.

authorities.name: Belgian Official Gazette (Belgisch Staatsblad / Moniteur belge)
authorities.notes: Official publication of all Belgian laws and royal decrees.

authorities.name: Ministry of Labour
authorities.notes: Enforces Belize Labour Act and employment standards.

authorities.name: Belize Tax Service Department
authorities.notes: Collects income tax and business tax in Belize.

authorities.name: Belize Social Security Board (SSB)
authorities.notes: Administers social security contributions and benefits for employees.

authorities.name: Belize Immigration Department
authorities.notes: Issues work permits and residency for foreign nationals.

authorities.name: Belize Laws (Laws of Belize Online)
authorities.notes: Official laws database; verify URL against belizelaw.org as hosting may change.

authorities.name: Ministerio de Trabajo, Empleo y Previsión Social
authorities.notes: Primary labour authority covering Bolivian labour law, minimum wage, and social security.

authorities.name: Servicio de Impuestos Nacionales (SIN)

authorities.name: Autoridad de Fiscalización y Control de Pensiones y Seguros (APS)
authorities.notes: Regulates pension system and insurance funds in Bolivia.

authorities.name: Dirección General de Migración (DIGEMIG)
authorities.notes: Issues work visas and foreign worker permits.

authorities.name: Gaceta Oficial del Estado Plurinacional de Bolivia
authorities.notes: Official gazette with all laws, decrees and regulations.

authorities.name: Ministry of Civil Affairs (Labour Division)
authorities.notes: Federal-level labour coordination. Entity labour laws apply separately in FBiH and RS.

authorities.name: Indirect Taxation Authority of BiH (ITA)
authorities.notes: Administers VAT and customs. Entity-level tax administrations handle income tax.

authorities.name: Federal Ministry of Labour and Social Policy (FBiH)
authorities.notes: FBiH entity authority for labour and social protection – covers majority of the country.

authorities.name: Service for Foreigners Affairs
authorities.notes: Issues work permits and residence approvals for foreign nationals in BiH.

authorities.name: Official Gazette of Bosnia and Herzegovina
authorities.notes: Official gazette of Bosnia and Herzegovina.

authorities.name: Ministry of Labour and Home Affairs

authorities.name: Botswana Unified Revenue Service (BURS)

authorities.name: Botswana Public Officers Pension Fund (BPOPF) / BURS

authorities.name: Department of Immigration and Citizenship Services

authorities.name: Attorney General Chambers – Laws of Botswana

authorities.name: Ministério do Trabalho e Emprego (MTE)

authorities.name: Receita Federal do Brasil (RFB)

authorities.name: Instituto Nacional do Seguro Social (INSS)

authorities.name: Polícia Federal – Imigração

authorities.name: Portal da Legislação – Planalto
authorities.notes: Official legislative portal of the Brazilian Presidency. Contains CLT and all federal acts.

authorities.name: Ministry of Labour and Social Policy
authorities.notes: Primary authority for labour law, minimum wage, and employment in Bulgaria.

authorities.name: National Revenue Agency (NRA)
authorities.notes: Administers income tax, corporate tax, social security contributions and VAT.

authorities.name: National Social Security Institute (NSSI)

authorities.name: Migration Directorate – Ministry of Interior
authorities.notes: Issues work permits and long-term residence for foreign nationals.

authorities.name: State Gazette (Darjaven Vestnik)

authorities.name: Ministry of Labour and Social Security (MINTSS)

authorities.name: Directorate General of Taxation (DGI)

authorities.name: National Social Insurance Fund (CNPS)
authorities.notes: Administers social insurance contributions (pensions, family, industrial injury) in Cameroon.

authorities.name: General Delegation of National Security (DGSN)

authorities.name: SciLeges – Cameroon Legal Portal

authorities.name: Dirección del Trabajo (DT)

authorities.name: Servicio de Impuestos Internos (SII)

authorities.name: Servicio Nacional de Migraciones (SERMIG)

authorities.name: Biblioteca del Congreso Nacional (BCN)

authorities.name: Ministry of Human Resources and Social Security (MOHRSS)

authorities.name: State Taxation Administration (STA)

authorities.name: National Social Security Fund Council (NSSFC)

authorities.name: National Immigration Administration (NIA)

authorities.name: National People's Congress (NPC) Law Database

authorities.name: Ministerio de Salud y Protección Social

authorities.name: Migración Colombia
authorities.notes: Issues work visas and foreign nationals' permits in Colombia.

authorities.name: Sistema Único de Información Normativa (SUIN)

authorities.name: Ministère du Travail et de la Sécurité Sociale

authorities.name: Direction Générale des Impôts et des Domaines (DGID)

authorities.name: Caisse Nationale de Sécurité Sociale (CNSS)

authorities.name: Direction Générale des Frontières

authorities.name: Journal Officiel de la République du Congo

authorities.name: National Gazette (Narodne novine)

authorities.name: Department of Labour

authorities.name: Migration Department

authorities.name: Cyprus Law Commissioner's Office

authorities.name: Ministry of Labour and Social Affairs (MPSV)

authorities.name: Czech Social Security Administration (CSSA)

authorities.name: Department of Asylum and Migration Policy (OAMP)

authorities.name: Collection of Laws (Sbírka zákonů)
